title: Agentic Workspace Operation Invocation
description: Typed invocation for a routed AW action. This object owns machine action identity; rendered commands are display or manual transport forms.

kind.description: Schema discriminator for typed operation invocations.

operation_id.description: Stable operation identity from the operation contract registry.

contract_version.description: Version of the operation contract this invocation targets.

arguments.description: Typed operation arguments independent of shell rendering.

effect_class.description: Effect classification admitted for this invocation.

required_authority.description: Authority source required before executing or trusting this invocation.

expected_input_revision.description: Optional revision or freshness precondition for the input state.

expected_transition.description: Expected state transition that distinguishes progress from a same-state loop.

idempotency_key.description: Stable retry identity derived from operation, arguments, revision, and transition.

claim_effect.description: Claim or proof effect authorized when the invocation succeeds.

renderings.description: Display or manual transport renderings derived from the typed invocation.

cli.description: CLI rendering for humans or manual execution.

manual.description: Manual recovery or adapter rendering when CLI is not the transport.

rule.description: Invariant explaining how consumers must treat this invocation.
